channel.title: Compliance on DevSecOps Canada | Security-First DevOps Consulting Toronto
channel.description: Recent content in Compliance on DevSecOps Canada | Security-First DevOps Consulting Toronto

item.title: PIPEDA Compliance with DevSecOps: Automating Privacy Controls in Your Delivery Pipeline
item.description: PIPEDA requires 72-hour breach notification if personal data is compromised. Most Canadian engineering teams’ CI/CD pipelines are unknowingly leaking PII in build logs. Here’s how to fix it with DevSecOps automation.
